# truenas_snapshot_task (Data Source)

Provides information about a periodic snapshot task on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_snapshot_task" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "snapshot_task_dataset" {
  value = data.truenas_snapshot_task.example.dataset
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric snapshot task ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `allow_empty` (Boolean) Whether empty snapshots are allowed.
- `dataset` (String) Dataset path.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the task is enabled.
- `exclude` (List of String) Excluded child datasets.
- `lifetime_unit` (String) Lifetime unit (HOUR, DAY, WEEK, MONTH, YEAR).
- `lifetime_value` (Number) Lifetime quantity.
- `naming_schema` (String) Snapshot naming schema.
- `recursive` (Boolean) Whether the snapshot is recursive.
- `schedule_dom` (String) Cron day-of-month field.
- `schedule_dow` (String) Cron day-of-week field.
- `schedule_hour` (String) Cron hour field.
- `schedule_minute` (String) Cron minute field.
- `schedule_month` (String) Cron month field.
